calculator.title: Rock Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Enter a scanned rock's mass and resistance — the calculator shows which laser cracks it and how many heads you need.

modules.label: Modules (global)
modules.hint: Modules apply to every laser as far as its slots allow; the gadget affects the rock once.
modules.activeHint: Active modules are treated as switched on (best case).

bonus.label: Crafted laser power bonus (%)
bonus.hint: Applies to every laser in the table — saved loadouts use their own stored crafted bonuses instead.

loadouts.title: Your loadouts
loadouts.loginRequired: Sign in to check your saved loadouts against this rock.
loadouts.gadgetNote: Saved loadout gadgets are ignored — the gadget selection above applies. Active modules count as switched on.

calculator.attribution: Break formula community-calibrated after mort13/BreakabilityChart (MIT) — no guarantee, CIG rebalances mining regularly.
